articles.description: Skipper John McGinn and Leon Bailey fire Aston Villa into the Europa League quarter-finals with victory over Lille.
articles.title: Aston Villa 2-0 Lille (3-0 agg): Villa finish off Lille to reach Europa League last eight

articles.description: Senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel breaks down Manchester United's search for a new midfielder to replace the outgoing Casemiro.
articles.title: Manchester United: Casemiro replacement contenders include Anderson, Wharton and Tonali

articles.description: Luke Littler comes from 5-0 down to stun Gerwyn Price 6-5 in the final of Premier League Darts in Dublin where there were two maximum 170 checkouts in one game.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler stuns Gerwyn Price after two 170 finishes

articles.description: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal's title being handed to Morocco 'has to be denounced', says Caf executive
Fifa rules women's teams must have female coaches

articles.description: Four Ireland players are chosen in the Six Nations Team of the Tournament, which also includes players from France, Italy, Scotland and Wales, but no England players make the XV.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: Four Ireland players named in team of tournament but no England players selected

articles.description: Great Britain's freestyle skier Kirsty Muir claims her second consecutive World Cup slopestyle victory to top the standings before the final event.
articles.title: Kirsty Muir's second consecutive slopestyle win puts her top of standings

articles.description: The England squad Thomas Tuchel names on Friday will give a big hint about who will be on the plane to the World Cup - so what are the issues he still needs to resolve?
articles.title: England friendlies: Thomas Tuchel picks final squad before he makes World Cup selection

articles.description: Nottingham Forest secure a Europa League quarter-final place with a penalty shootout win over Danish side Midtjylland.
articles.title: Midtjylland 1-2 Nottingham Forest (0-3 on pens): Reds reach Europa League quarter-finals

articles.description: Manchester United defender Matthijs de Ligt is "improving" but manager Michael Carrick is unable to put a timeframe on the Dutchman's return from a back injury.
articles.title: Man Utd manager Michael Carrick does not know when injured Matthijs De Ligt will return
